meaning: 主页,通过万维网(Web)进行信息查询的起始信息页
examples: This photo shows the contest's homepage.
Now, do you see the mic option on the homepage?
Microsoft has a different approach to their homepage.
Users will also be able to customize both their homepage and access to their favorite applications.
The downloadable software, currently free of charge, was made available on the company's homepage, BlueStacks.com.
